events.text: Cristian Gamboa (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Joel Campbell (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Switzerland 1, Costa Rica 0. Blerim Dzemaili (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Breel Embolo with a headed pass.
Stephan Lichtsteiner (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Switzerland 1, Costa Rica 1. Kendall Waston (Costa Rica) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Joel Campbell with a cross   following a corner.
Denis Zakaria (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Fabian Schär (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Switzerland 2, Costa Rica 1. Josip Drmic (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Denis Zakaria with a cross.
Kendall Waston (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card.
Own Goal by Yann Sommer, Switzerland.  Switzerland 2, Costa Rica 2.
